event: Conference between Indian chiefs and Colonel Bouquet in 1764
description: A black and white engraving in an ornamental border depicting a diplomatic meeting between colonial military officers and Native American chiefs. The scene takes place under a canopy or shelter. European officers in military dress sit on one side while Native American figures in traditional dress face them. The composition shows a formal council arrangement. Text below the image identifies it as a conference held between Indian chiefs and Colonel Bouquet in the year 1764. The engraving style is characteristic of eighteenth-century book illustrations.

_meta.title: A Conference held between some Indian Chiefs and Colonel Bouquet, in the Year 1764
